awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of free/libre plugins, scripts and add-ons for Godot
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of free/libre plugins, scripts and add-ons for Godot

nodes.itemHTML: • spout-gdstars6 - Share OpenGL textures across Windows applications through your GPU using Spoutstars537.
• vpupprstars348 - A cross-platform VTuber application with mulitple tracking backends.
• Dialogue Managerstars415 - A simple but powerful text based branching dialogue editor and runtime (Godot 3.x, 4.x).
• Input Helperstars188 - A helper for detecting input devices and remapping controls (Godot 3.x, 4.x).
• Scene Managerstars71 - Make nice and customizable scene transitions in one line of code (Godot 3.x, 4.0.alpha).
• godot-plystars151 - In-editor box modelling for gray boxing or prototyping 3D levels.
• AutoCollidersstars4 - Allows the automatic generation of colliders for Sprites, with planned expansion to handle 3D meshes in the future (Godot 3.x).
• GodotHookstars7 - A lite custom event system for Godot Engine (Godot 3.x, 4.x).
• Godot FPS Templatestars33 - A free first person game template for the Godot Engine.
• GodotNotificationCenterstars55 - A notification center (Godot 3.x).
• Scrolling Backgroundstars23 - A scrolling background node (Godot 2.1,3.x).
• SimpleGodotCRTShaderstars288 - A simple Godot shader that simulates CRT Displays (Godot 2.x, 3.x).
• SMRT-Godotstars105 - A dialog system and editor fairly customizable, a nice fit for story-driven games (Godot 3.x).
• AntialiasedLine2Dstars71 - Higher-quality antialiased Line2D and Polygon2D drawing compared to the default Godot implementation (GLES3 + GLES2, all platforms).
• Godot VirtualJoystickstars5 - A simple vitual joystick for mobile devices.
• Godotes - Weekly micro data analysis reports about the Godot engine and its ecosystem.
• Everplaststars28 - Unique 2D platforming experience filled with rage, rush, speed, and spray.
• godot-simple-statestars34 - A minimal finite state machine using nodes, perfect for Jam games.
• Godot First Person Camerastars35 - A simple FPS starter with jumping, movement, flashlight and a player character with animations.
• Godot Game Of Lifestars18 - Conway's Game of life using shaders.
• Godot Radial Menustars84 - A radial menu written in shader code for performance.
• FMOD GD4stars8 - FMOD Studio API integration.
• Debanding Material Shaderstars21 - Simple material shader with added debanding noise, for use with the GLES2 renderer as it doesn't support full-screen debanding.
• Dijkstra map for Godotstars55 - A GDNative project for Godot game engine, that introduces Dijktra Map pathfinding node.
• Discord.gdstars81 - Discord bot API wrapper. Make bots in 100% GDScript.
• Line Collider 2Dstars5 - A script which adds colliders that follow an array of Line2Ds (useful for prototypes).
• obs-websocket-gdstars38 - Script and editor plugin to control Open Broadcaster Software from Godot via obs-websocket (Godot 3.x).
• BoxCam2Dstars10 - Simplest way to implement grid-based 2D camera movement (Godot 3.x).
• Lorienstars3.4k - Infinite-canvas drawing/whiteboarding app for Windows, Linux and macOS. Supports drawing tablets and pressure sensitivity.
• Portal 2Dstars48 - 2D remake of the Portal games.
• Aseprite Wizardstars259 - Plugin for importing animations from Aseprite as SpriteFrames (Godot 3.x).
• Godot Demo Projectsstars2.7k - Official Godot demo projects (everything except the TPS demo).
• TPS Demostars657 - Official Godot third person shooter (TPS) demo with high quality graphics.

• GodotDiscordSDKstars46 - A GDNative wrapper for the Discord Game SDK, adding support for its functionality in GDScript without recompiling the engine (as opposed to something like godotcord which is a custom engine module).
• Voxel-Corestars349 - GDScript voxel plugin for creating, importing and editing voxel content in-engine and in-game.

• Visual Studio Code
    • godot-tools Visual Studio Code Extension - A complete set of tools to code games with Godot Engine in Visual Studio Code. Includes a GDScript language client.
    • C# Tools for Godot Visual Studio Code Extension - Debugger and utilities for working with Godot C# projects in VSCode.
    • GUT Visual Studio Code Extensionstars14 - Run GUT framework unit/integration tests directly from the Visual Studio Code Editors.
    • gdformat Visual Studio Code Extension - Formatter for GDScript in Visual Studio Code (Godot 3.x).
• Godot Asset Library - Official Godot Asset Library. Includes user-created games, projects, templates, demos, tutorials, plugins, and scripts.
• GdUnit3stars228 - Godot Unit Testing Framework (Godot 3.x).
• godot-inkstars243 - A C# (Mono) plugin to integrate stories writen in inkstars3.3k, a scripting language for writing interactive narrative.
• Godot Recipes - A large collection of tutorials and techniques, both big and small.
• Godot SQLitestars402 - GDNative wrapper for SQLite, making it possible to use SQLite databases as data storage in your project (Godot 3.2+).
• AgonesSDKstars27 - Plugin to add Agonesstars4.8k SDK functionality to Godot (Godot 3.x).
• StoryTeller Enginestars12 - Dialog and interactive fiction engine (Godot 3.x).
• Godot Polygon 2D Fracturestars184 - Two simple scripts for fracturing and cutting polygons.
• GNU Nanostars0 - Syntax highlighting.
• build-godot - (and build-godot-mono) Scripts that compile and run Godot, attempting to install dependencies if needed.
• Crystal Bit Godot Game Templatestars323 - Opinionated game template. It includes continuous integration, scene loading with graphic transitions and game pause handling.

• NativeLibstars62 - Plugin management system designed to easily operate with native libraries for iOS/Android. It also takes care about plugin dependencies and provides hassle-free native libs updating. Attribution and analytics: Adjust, Amplitude, AppsFlyer, Flurry, GameAnalytics, Tenjin. Ads networks and mediation: AdColony, AppLovin, TapDaq. GDPR and privacy: App Tracking Transparency, Ogury. Social: Facebook. Universal backend solution: Firebase.
• Escoriastars661 - Point & click adventure game framework (Godot 2.1, 3.2+).
• GodotSteamstars1.3k - Steam API library binding for Godot. Supports Windows, macOS and Linux (Godot 3.x).
• Texture Packerstars34 - Tools to layer, pack, and merge textures at runtime (Godot 3.2+, 4.0).
• Voxelmanstars65 - A voxel engine with more focus on editor integration, gameplay-related features, and extendability (Godot 3.2+, 4.0).
• GodotOnReadystars93 - A C# (Mono) alternative to the GDScript-only onready keyword, without reflection.
• Arrowstars524 - A tool to design game narratives with nodes.
• EffekseerForGodot3stars104 - Import Effekseer particle effects (Godot 3.x).
• Godot Gif Getterstars26 - An in-game utility for recording and saving GIFs (written in GDNative Rust).
• Tree generatorstars96 - Tool for generating trees.
• Speech to Textstars26 - Captures the user's microphone input and converts it to text.
• Funexpected Flash Toolsstars14 - Adobe Animate (Flash) plugin that allows you to export a project for a Godot Engine.
• Flash Modulestars23 - Use Adobe Animate (Flash) projects in Godot.
• GodotAIGymstars138 - Make your Godot project into an OpenAI Gym environment to train RL models with PyTorch.
• Ridiculous Codingstars304 - Makes your coding experience in Godot 1000× more ridiculous (Godot 3.x).
• Shell Furstars221 - 3D fur node for Godot.
• This Week in Godot - A weekly newsletter with news, tutorials, game and demo releases and more.
• Godot GamePadstars100 - Allows players to use their mobile devices as controllers.
• SmartShape2Dstars721 - A 2D terrain tool.
• Godexstars729 - An entity component system library.
• Animastars370 - Run sequential and parallel animations with less code compared to Tween (Godot 3.x).
• Godot experimentsstars251 - Several 2D, 3D and VR experiments.
• Godot Shadersstars1.8k - A large library of free and open-source shaders for 2D and 3D.
• Kehom's Godot Addon Packstars125 - A collection of addons for debugging, networking, UI, and more.
• 2D Destructible Objectsstars306 - A script that takes a sprite, divides it into blocks and makes them explode💥 (Godot 3.x).
• CRT Shaderstars241 - A Godot shader that simulates CRT Displays with many shader parameters (Godot 3.x).
• RetroPie Godot Game Engine "Emulator"stars68 - A scriptmodule to install a Godot "emulator" for RetroPie.
• ProtonGraphstars884 - Node-based tool for procedural content creation. Like visual scripting, but for 3D model generation (needs custom engine modules).
• HTerrainstars1.1k - Heightmap-based terrain. Supports texture painting, colouring, holes, level of detail and grass (Godot 3.x).
• CSG Mesh Exporter (.OBJ)stars39 - Export CSG nodes to OBJ meshes to improve editing performance.
• Godot Shaders - A community-driven shader library for the Godot game engine.
• Gotm.io - A website for hosting HTML5 games that were made in Godot.
• 2D Day/Night Cyclestars247 - A ☀️ Day / 🌔 Night cycle for 2D (Godot 3.x).
• GDSerCommPluginstars46 - A plugin to read Arduino serial input (needs custom engine modules).
• godot-voxelstars1.4k - Module for creating volumetric worlds (Godot 3.1+).
• spindle of serendipity - Word guessing game with customizable entries.
• Entity Spell Systemstars87 - An entity and spell system for complex (optionally multiplayer) RPGs (Godot 3.2, 4.0).
• godot-anlstars98 - A wrapper for Accidental Noise Librarystars71 with a visual noise editing support.
• godot-pythonstars1.4k - Python support for Godot 3.
• Gdnet for Godot 3stars110 - An ENet wrapper for Godot 3.
• godotcordstars42 - A wrapper for the Discord Game SDK.
• godot-apple-idstars27 - Module for sign in with Apple in Godot.
• Godot-Slicerstars102 - A port of Ezy-Slicerstars1.4k for Godot.
• Gooststars382 - A general-purpose, extensible and customizable extension.
• PortAudiostars11 - Wrapper methods and Godot-friendly types to use PortAudio.
• FMOD Integrationstars162 - Module to integrate the FMOD audio engine in Godot.
• godot-enet-betterstars86 - A better ENet module for high-performance multiplayer games with Godot.
• Head tracking using OpenCVstars39
• Open Adaptive Music Librarystars54
• NativeDialogsstars21 - Using native dialogs in Godot.
• RawPackerstars20 - Simple binary packing/unpacking for RawArray.
• spinestars124 - Spine animation support module.
• WaterSplash 2D nodestars32
• godot.sh - Script that automatically downloads and launches latest version of Godot, or compiles and launches the Git master branch.
• godot-wrapperstars13 - Script that helps Debian and Ubuntu users install and use Godot.
• replicate-file.sh - Script to update copies of a file with one master file.
• gd2cs.pystars45 - Python script that converts GDScript code to C# (WIP).
• Code Snapshotstars40 - A plugin which lets you take beautified screenshots of your code within the editor.
• Dialogicstars1.9k - Create dialogs, characters and scenes to display conversations.
• Scatterstars1k - Randomly fill an area with props or other scenes.
• GDGotm - GDScript API for gotm.io.
• Librerama - A free/libre fast-paced arcade collection of mini-games.
• SuperStarfighterstars363 - Fast-paced local party game with starships that battle in a top-down arena.
• TuxBuilderstars191 - Work-in-progress reimplementation of SuperTux.
• Blipshiftstars13 - Simple top-down moving platforms game.
• Circle Jumpstars127 - Mobile arcade game, addicting and enjoyable. How-to-made tutorial is available, so you can recreate it yourself and learn Godot.
• Haldricstars372 - Official work-in-progress reimplementation of Battle for Wesnoth.
• SealedBite - 2D platformer game, winner of the GitHub Game Off 2019 jam.
• Unknown Horizonsstars450 - Official work-in-progress reimplementation of Unknown Horizons.
• Breakablestars58 - A breakout-like game.
• Memory Gamestars24 - Simple Memory game.
• BlockPopstars25 - A simple Breakout clone.
• Bombsstars14 - Simple mobile game. You need to touch bombs to defuse them.
• Captain Holetoothstars57 - Explorative platformer in a detailed world. Geared towards younger players.
• Dolphin Island 2stars162 - Platformer game made for the A Game By It's Cover 2015 Game Jam.
• DynaDungeonsstars193 - Bomberman clone in a fantasy universe.
• Kraken-Rampagestars4 - Ludum Dare 33 entry made in 48 hours.
• Minehunterstars13 - A Minesweeper clone.
• Minilens - Free puzzle platform game.
• Mountain of Hopestars11 - Game made on Theater Game Jam (PGA 2015).
• Ninja-Trainingstars34 - Small running game done as 1 hour challenge.
• No hopestars8 - Ludum Dare 33 entry made in 48 hours.
• Planet Riderstars32 - 2D physics parkour game in an alien environment.
• Platshootstars41 - A 2D shooter game.
• Ringedstars76 - Top-down shooter with extensive usage of light effects.
• Tanks of Freedomstars992 - Free turn-based isometric strategy game.
• Three Hungry Micestars4 - Breakout game with mice made for the Godot Engine Jam of March 2016.
• Broken Sealsstars270 - A work-in-progress third person action RPG with multiplayer support (needs custom engine modules).
• Super Tux Party - A free/libre and open-source party game that is meant to replicate the feel of games such as Mario Party.
• Thrivestars1.8k - A free, open-source game about the evolution of life (Mono).
• Rapid Rescuestars61 - Rapid Rescue is a local multiplayer strategy game inspired by Labyrinth.
• Meteoritestars277 - A lowres metroidvania FPS, inspired by Metroid Prime, made for LOWREZJAM 2018.
• Cheese Hunterstars14 - A game for Godot Engine Jam of March 2016.

• Godellostars550 - A Trello-like kanban board application made with Godot. A proof of concept for complex non-game applications with Godot, as well real-time online interactions between multiple users. Includes backend code.
• Material Makerstars2k - Create PBR materials procedurally (similar to Substance Designer).
• Pixeloramastars3.7k - 2D pixel art editor.
• First Person Starterstars285 - Template with First Person Controller, easily adjustable from the Inspector.
• Minimum Gamestars43 - Template top-down 2D pixel art game, with multiple rooms, a HUD, menus, and autosaving.
• Multiplayer First Person Shooterstars54 - Multiplayer first person shooter example project.
• Multiplayer Third Person Shooterstars52 - Multiplayer third person shooter example project.
• Godot-GameTemplatestars747 - Template with all necessary stuff taken care of. Designed for pixel art games.
• The Towerstars12 - A voxel-based parkour game to show the capabilities of the Voxelman module.
• Realistic Water Shaderstars396 - Realistic 3D water shader with foam and caustics.
• OpenRPGstars1.2k - JRPG-style game demo and template.
• voxelgamestars304 - Minecraft-like voxel terrain demo, utilising the godot_voxel module.
• Open Source A-RPG Demostars841 - RPG demo.
• FPS Teststars58 - A singleplayer FPS test. Physics work, but there are no enemies and no proper shooting.
• Pathfinding 2dstars65 - A demo project demonstrating pathfinding using a tilemap.
• UDP Snapshot interpolationstars59 - Lets you connect to a server and view networked physics.
• UDP State synchronizationstars139 - A more efficient networking demo than the snapshot interpolation one.
• Voxel Gamestars67 - Minecraft-like voxel terrain demo.
• GodotPhoenixChannelsstars200 - A GDScript and Godot Engine implementation for the Channels API of the Phoenix Framework (Godot 3.*).
• GodotTIEstars265 - Text Interface Engine to control text output (like in a RPG dialogue) (Godot 2.x, 3.x).
• gtermstars87 - GUI control that draws something similar to *nix terminal emulators (Godot >= 2.1).
• GUTstars1k - Utility for writing unit tests in GDScript (Godot 3.x).
• InGridstars72 - Infinite scrolling grid (Godot 3.x).
• Tiled importerstars665 - Import maps from Tiled (Godot 3.x).
• TileSet Builderstars12 - Quickly build tilesets with style (Godot 3.x).
• Cartographerstars354 - Heightmap-based 3D terrain editor.
• Delaunator GDScriptstars56 - A GDScript library for Delaunay triangulation of 2D points.
• GDGIFExporterstars78 - GIF exporter made entirely in GDScript.
• GitHub integrationstars203 - Interact with GitHub without opening your browser.
• godotccdstars52 - Fast 3D collision checks in Godot using libccd.
• godotdetourstars114 - A GDNative implementation of the detour/detourcrowd library.
• Godot NExtstars733 - A set of basic node extensions.
• Godot Mixing Deskstars514 - Make procedural sound and adaptive/procedural music with a few nodes and a couple lines of code.
• GodotRxstars63 - Reactive extensions for Godot C# (Mono).
• Godot-Trail-Systemstars264 - Advanced 2D/3D trail system.
• Level of Detail (LOD)stars182 - Level of detail add-on for meshes, lights and particles. Can improve performance in large scenes.
• MDFrameworkstars68 - A C# multiplayer framework with additional tools (Mono).
• Mitigate-IKstars4 - Mitigates the scaling effects of SkeletonIK.
• NI mate Motion Capturestars28 - Animate Skeletons with a Microsoft Kinect sensor.
• Qodotstars766 - Quake .map file support for Godot. Lets you use TrenchBroom for level design.
• UI Design Toolstars233 - Intuitive design workflow for UIs in the editor.
• Volumetricsstars256 - Voxel-based volumetric lighting and fog plugin.
• VPainterstars320 - 3D vertex painting plugin.
• Waterwaysstars592 - Tool to generate river meshes with flow and foam maps based on Bézier curves.
• Yume Visual Novel Editorstars85 - An integrated editor for creating visual novel games.
• FMOD GDNativestars148 - Plugin to use the FMOD audio engine in GDScript.
• gdstatsstars31 - A library of pseudorandom number generators for common statistical distributions.
• Auto Tile Layerstars28 - Allows automatic 2D tiling using RPG Maker's Autotile format.
• Grass Pluginstars61 - A plugin to handle huge amounts of grass, foliages and other vegetations.
• SUTjoystick - Easy gamepad support for GNU/Linux and Windows.
• Raspberry Pi 4 buildsstars214 - ARM builds of Godot Engine for the Raspberry Pi 4.
• Calinou's builds - Mainly master branch, other branches can be found here.
• iFire's builds - Distributed via Itch.io (automatic updates with app), master branch only.
• codetranslatorstars30 - Translates GDScript to C# (WIP).
• gdscript-pp - Translates GDScript to GDNative C++ (WIP).
• JetBrains Rider (C#)stars147 - Syntax highlighting, autocompletion and run configurations.
• Emacsstars202 - Syntax highlighting, code folding, indentation and autocompletion.
• Vimstars298 - Syntax highlighting, autocompletion and linting using the LSP server provided by the Godot editor. Also supports the Godot shader language.
• Godot syntax themesstars218 - 13 syntax themes including Ayu Mirage, Darcula, Gruvbox Dark, Monokai, One Dark, Solarized, and more.
• Godot Game Toolsstars304 - Blender plugin to ease importing assets into Godot.
• godot-gdscript-toolkitstars424 - Independent set of command line tools for working with GDScript - parser, linter and formatter (Godot 3.x).
• IntelliJ IDEAstars118 - Syntax highlighting and autocompletion.
• Kakounestars7 - Syntax highlighting.
• base16-godotstars26 - All base16stars81 themes.
• Atom - Syntax highlighting.
• Geanystars16 - Syntax highlighting.
• Geditstars16 - Syntax highlighting.
• Sublime Textstars64 - Syntax highlighting.
• gd-com npm package - Communicate with Godot clients using Node.js.
• godot-cistars348 - Docker image to export Godot games through CI. Includes GitLab CI script example.
• Easing Scriptstars45 - A port of the Robert Penner's equations for easing.
• gdutilsstars89 - Utilities for Godot written in GDScript.
• Syntax themes by Geequlim - Chester, Google Code Light and Monokai.
• Camera2D Screen Shake - Screen shake effect for Camera2D.
• Polygon Mergestars14 - Merge polygons.
• Simplex 2D/3Dstars23 - Simplex deterministic noise functions.
• Tileset Builder - Build tilesets.
• strip-to-frames.pl - Perl script to split a grid spritesheet image into numbered individual frame files.
